chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CR. BAIL NO.1077/2014 ____________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge ____________________________________________________________ FOR ORDERS ON REFERENCE DATED 25.7.2015 16.11.2015 Mr. Zafar Ahmed Khan Addl.P.G. _________________________ By means of this reference learned trial Court has sought surety documents furnished by accused namely Muhammad Faisal before this Court in terms of order dated 10.02.2015, on the ground that accused has absconded away and an action in accordance with law is required to be taken against him. Learned Addl. P.G. has no objection in this regard. Accordingly, this reference is disposed of with direction to the Nazir to send surety papers furnished by the accused to learned trial Court for taking action against him according to law, after keeping photocopies of the same on record. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI
